name: evans-solo-rpg-toolbox
description: Foundry VTT content module for solo RPG utilities.

scripts.pack:tables: npx fvtt package pack --id evans-solo-rpg-toolbox --type Module --compendiumName solo-rpg-tables --inputDirectory src/packs/solo-rpg-tables --outputDirectory packs
scripts.pack:macros: npx fvtt package pack --id evans-solo-rpg-toolbox --type Module --compendiumName solo-rpg-macros --inputDirectory src/packs/solo-rpg-macros --outputDirectory packs
scripts.build: npm run compile && rm -rf packs && npm run pack:tables && npm run pack:macros

author: Evan
